summary: South Bay startups are on a historic funding tear: Nexthop AI (Santa Clara) closed a $500M Series B, while Ayar Labs (San Jose) and Mind Robotics (Palo Alto) each landed $500M Series E and Series A rounds, respectively. With over $4 billion in capital flowing across the region in recent weeks—from AI to semiconductors to robotics—most local tech companies are hiring aggressively, though a few are tightening belts.
